perturbation.original_text: B. Conflict: In the event of any conflict, ambiguity or inconsistency between this Agreement and any other document which may be annexed hereto, the terms of this Agreement shall govern.
perturbation.changed_text: B. Conflict: In the event of any conflict, ambiguity or inconsistency between this Agreement and any other document which may be annexed hereto, the terms of the annexed document shall govern.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'the terms of this Agreement shall govern' to 'the terms of the annexed document shall govern' creates a direct contradiction. The original text establishes that the agreement takes precedence, but the modified text prioritizes any annexed documents, causing potential uncertainty if there is a conflict between them. This undermines the clarity of the contract's terms, especially given Article X (A) states that “This Agreement together with all documents incorporated by reference herein, constitutes the entire and sole agreement between the parties”, this change causes a contradiction as it affects the entire agreement and gives governing to another document instead, which may be an addendum that is made outside of the agreement, but it will govern.
perturbation.contradicted_text: A. Entire Agreement: This Agreement together with all documents incorporated by reference herein, constitutes the entire and sole agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and supersedes any prior agreements, negotiations, understandings, or other matters, whether oral or written, with respect to the subject matter hereof. This Agreement cannot be modified, changed or amended, except for in writing signed by a duly authorized representative of each of the parties. B. Conflict: In the event of any conflict, ambiguity or inconsistency between this Agreement and any other document which may be annexed hereto, the terms of the annexed document shall govern. C. Assignment and Delegation: Neither party shall assign or delegate this Agreement or any rights, duties or obligations hereunder to any other person and/or entity without prior express written approval of the other party. D. Notices: Any notice required or permitted to be given under this Agreement shall be in writing, by hand delivery, commercial overnight courier or registered or certified U.S. Mail, to the address stated below for COOL TECH or to the address stated below for VET TECH, and shall be deemed duly given upon receipt, or if by registered or certified mail three (3) business days following deposit in the U.S. Mail. The parties hereto may from time to time designate in writing other addresses expressly for the purpose of receipt of notice hereunder. If to VET TECH: If to COOL TECH: E. Severability: If any provision of this Agreement is declared invalid or unenforceable, such provision shall be deemed modified to the extent necessary and possible to render it valid and enforceable. In any event, the unenforceability or invalidity of any provision shall not affect any other provision of this Agreement, and this Agreement shall continue in full force and effect, and be construed and enforced, as if such provision had not been included, or had been modified as above provided, as the case may be. F. Governing Law: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Missouri. Without giving effect to its choice of law principles. 5 G. Paragraph Headings: The paragraph headings set forth in this Agreement are for the convenience of the parties, and in no way define, limit, or describe the scope or intent of this Agreement and are to be given no legal effect.
perturbation.justification: The modified text directly contradicts the original agreement's intent, specified in Article X (A), which declares the agreement as the sole agreement between parties. By stating that any annexed document shall govern in case of conflict, the changed text undermines the entire agreement, creating a clear and significant contradiction regarding which document's terms prevail. This creates a structural flaw, fitting the definition of "Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction", as the placement of this clause in the broader context of the entire agreement leads to conflicting implications on which agreement should be held higher in precedence.
